title: Maryland Association of Disability Examiners (MADE) — By-Laws
description: Governing by-laws of the Maryland Association of Disability Examiners (MADE), the Maryland chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) within the Mid-Atlantic Region (MARADE). Covers chapter name, NADE affiliation, definitions, purpose, membership (persons living or working in Maryland other than SSA Headquarters staff), finances and membership year, officers (President, Vice-President, Secretary, Treasurer, Representative to the Regional Executive Board), the Executive Board, committees, meetings, parliamentary authority, and amendments. Dated/completed 03/09/1979, approved 1980, amended 11/15/1985 and 01/23/1998.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Maryland Chapter (MADE)
source.title: By-Laws of the Maryland Association of Disability Examiners (MADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'Maryland-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived. Document states it was 'Dated and completed 03/09/79, approved 1980' and 'Amended 11/15/85' and 'Amended 01/23/98', captured as temporal_coverage 1979-1998. NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
